{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175359A6A10A8FF509DEE8C790"}"},"total":10864},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595946061065569048","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，番茄类似题材的书很多，这么催泪的真少，最重要的是书中的人物有很明显的成长，不是单纯推动剧情的机器，如果人物描写能更加细致饱满就更好了[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768572130,"group_id":"7587014945980566590","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"风神的虔信徒","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxGGqC8XojI+KH1wBz6xpl8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dfc27cecad59412e96232d7bf65d1953~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533822&x-signature=1cZTbyLqT80ihvKbwJf%2Fyn5Oo8U%3D","user_id":"79574334612","user_name":"千风中的精灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"79574334612","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587014945980566590","book_info":{"abstract":"“兄弟们，千万别信那个叫洛安的设计师！他是个骗子！！”
千万粉丝的大主播狂哥，在直播间哭得像个三百斤的孩子，手里还死死抓着VR头盔不肯撒手。
“他说这是休闲旅游游戏，结果开局把我扔进零下四十度的雪山！”
“他说无氪金无内购，结果一个冷硬的黑馒头，要拿命去换！”
“他说NPC只是数据，可那个班长为了救我，把最后一口干粮塞进我嘴里，自己活活冻死在风雪里……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c7d40f5708795e16866eb05d2af926a","author":"洛洛的洛洛","author_id":"","book_id":"7587014945980566590","book_name":"长征副本你嚣张，班长死了哭什么","book_short_name":"我的长征模拟路","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"87.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590053396820787736","read_count":"872278","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"662059"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"301","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/537d86d55cd0ecaf56ec97b4365b9dab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184439&x-signature=ngCdkJNXf0H9PRvUMlIdOBqkuLQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1308831163110892","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320175359A6A10A8FF509DEE8C790"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":874,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5823,"reply_count":16,"show_pv":268964},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595921089793213209","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很感人，是那种自然而然的感人。里面的人物确是很鲜活的，我能感受到每个人都在在成长都在蜕变，他们的成长我们都是肉眼可观察到的。每个人都被作者塑造的活灵活现。（可能是因为我平时不常看虐文，反正这本算是我在番茄为数不多能把我虐哭的。）‘我不知道什么样的文笔算好，反正我是很喜欢。作者这本书的是那种质朴的直动人心的，好就像是将士们的笑容，老班长的鼓励一样。′作者在很努力的完成作品，里面的主角也在很努力的活出价值。
来都来了，顺便就催催更。[送心][送心][送心]要继续努力呀，作者！！！我就安心躺这儿，等你来喂我了。[敬礼][送心][饱了][饱了][饱了][饱了][饱了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768565630,"group_id":"7587014945980566590","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"风吹八万里，念你无归期","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N711yQakWX2OxHveOfRe0Tsp7jx0fU/yeQI+ScLMaRAO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/133e7e1194904f89a0e2bc9b369e6ff0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536601&x-signature=b8qX1Gt8TDqepjWgfsU25Ksb2%2Fk%3D","user_id":"2294047041913100","user_name":"不抽象抽你ma"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2294047041913100","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587014945980566590","book_info":{"abstract":"“兄弟们，千万别信那个叫洛安的设计师！他是个骗子！！”

ction":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596309286039175961","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很催泪，文笔很细腻，感情描写也很恰当，正如长征爬雪山，过草地，先辈用生命为新中国铺路，剧情中三人的情感描写从最初的不屑慢慢的改变，这才是最吸引人的地方，环境是改变人的本质，我们感受不到长征时的经历，但是却会铭记历史。
好评，真的让我感到很震撼，在语文书里面的内容已经很让我难以置信之为，作者还用VR的设定来身临其境的体验，以文字来共情剧情，丰满老班长和小战士们的人物。
五星好评没的说！！！[敬礼][敬礼][敬礼]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768656025,"group_id":"7587014945980566590","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"总有些事情要高于其他","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyUhL9dlEzNUAZe5GuNHivnGc2QyePS8V1R32931hDSZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/30f259dbaa5b4774aa95b64725f8fe3a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536291&x-signature=JDIHR1qa0vgvQ2qyXJqoSnmWXrc%3D","user_id":"2269038907497469","user_name":"我煮为金榜框框撞大墙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2269038907497469","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587014945980566590","book_info":{"abstract":"“兄弟们，千万别信那个叫洛安的设计师！他是个骗子！！”
